content:
# Cluster Analysis

**Summary**: A grouping analysis used to identify similarities between samples and determine their geographic or source origins.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2024-alenazi|Alenazi, 2024]] applied cluster analysis to investigate the location of the group of samples and provide information about possible sources of exposure.

- [[2024-jalloh|Jalloh, 2024]] applied cluster analysis to identify six distinct clusters reflecting variations in species composition and environmental conditions.

## Instruments and Software



- [[2024-jalloh|Jalloh, 2024]] applied cluster analysis to identify six distinct clusters reflecting variations in species composition and environmental conditions.

## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- Cluster analysis is used to investigate the location of the group of samples and ultimately provide enough information about the possible sources of exposure. ([[2024-alenazi|Alenazi, 2024, p. 28]])

- Identified six distinct clusters ranging from shallow lagoonal environments to deep marine/intra-shelf basin settings. ([[2024-jalloh|Jalloh, 2024, p. 67]])
